retrieval.query_summary: Analyze Boom 1000 Index for a pro-trend bearish continuation setup based on HTF alignment and MTF structural shift.

factors.name: Macro bias alignment
factors.notes: Macro data is not available; treated as neutral/aligned per system rules.

factors.name: HTF structure aligned
factors.notes: Setup is SHORT, aligning with the confirmed BEARISH trend on the D1 and W1 timeframes.

factors.name: MTF BOS or ChoCH confirmed
factors.notes: A bearish CHoCH and BMS are confirmed on the H6 timeframe at 14244.184, signaling a resumption of the HTF trend.

factors.name: Valid Structural Entry Support
factors.notes: The entry is based on a valid H6 bearish Order Block (14329.8 - 14453.94) with an overlapping FVG.

factors.name: Liquidity sweep into entry zone
factors.notes: The setup was preceded by a clear sweep of Buy-Side Liquidity (BSL) at 14444.415, fulfilling the Stop Hunt (SH) criteria.

factors.name: COT alignment
factors.notes: COT data is not available for this instrument.

factors.name: Wyckoff phase supports direction
factors.notes: Wyckoff phase is not explicitly confirmed, but the price action is consistent with a UTAD or the start of a Markdown phase.

factors.name: No high-impact news within 30 minutes
factors.notes: No high-impact news events were provided in the data.

factors.name: Minimum R:R achievable
factors.notes: The setup offers a potential R:R of over 1:9 to the final TP, far exceeding the 1:3 minimum for the Intraday style.

cot_signal.summary: No COT data available for this instrument.

evidence.content_preview: Every entry must be inside or at a valid 4H or higher Supply/Demand zone or Order Block.

raw_response.explainable_reasoning: The analysis identifies a high-probability, pro-trend short setup on the Boom 1000 Index. The HTF context (D1/W1) is unequivocally bearish. Following a corrective pullback on the H8 timeframe, market structure on the H6, H4, and H1 timeframes has shifted back to bearish, confirming the potential for the next leg down. The selected trade candidate is a high-confluence H6 SH+CHoCH+BMS+FVG+RTO pattern, which formed after sweeping buy-side liquidity at 14444.415 and subsequently breaking structure at 14244.184. The entry is planned as a limit order within the origin H6 Order Block and FVG (14354.852 - 14425.982), anticipating a return to this premium price point. The stop loss is structurally sound, placed above the OB high. Take profit targets are set at clear liquidity pools on the H1 and D1 charts, offering an excellent R:R of over 1:9. With a confluence score of 7/10, this setup is graded 'A' and warrants execution.

htf_bias.notes: The overall trend is strongly bearish, confirmed by the D1 and W1 timeframes. A significant bearish CHoCH occurred on D1 at 2026-04-11, breaking structure to the downside. Price is currently trading below a key unmitigated D1 bearish Order Block at 14449.495 - 14759.786, indicating that the path of least resistance is downwards.

mtf_bias.notes: After a counter-trend pullback on the H8 timeframe, the MTF (H6, H4, H1) has realigned with the HTF bearish trend. A clear bearish CHoCH and BMS occurred on the H6 timeframe at 14244.184, confirming the shift in momentum back to the downside. The H1 timeframe also confirms this with its own bearish CHoCH. This signals a high-probability continuation of the HTF bearish move.

evidence.content_preview: SL must be structural — placed beyond the invalidation level of the setup (beyond OB, beyond QML, beyond swing high/low)

stop_loss.reason: Placed structurally above the high of the H6 bearish Order Block (14453.94) to invalidate the setup if broken.

take_profits.basis: Nearest significant H1 Swing Low (SSL) liquidity pool.
Lower bound of the unmitigated D1 Fair Value Gap.
Major D1 Swing Low (SSL) and primary draw on liquidity.
